description: Migrate legacy PLC-5 processors to ControlLogix platform on the main assembly line, including I/O conversion and HMI updates.
Upgrade plant-wide SCADA from Wonderware 2014 to AVEVA System Platform with redundant servers and historian integration.
Install two FANUC robotic weld cells with safety fencing, tooling fixtures, and integration to existing line PLC.
Retrofit Line 4 conveyors with VFD-driven motors, new photo-eyes, and updated controls logic for variable speed zones.
Rebuild end-of-line palletizer control panel, replace obsolete drives, and reprogram for new case patterns.
Design and commission a Cognex-based vision inspection station for label verification at packaging line exit.
Validate batching control system per ISA-88, including FAT/SAT documentation and recipe management updates.
Upgrade press shop safety circuits to Cat 3 with light curtains, safety PLC, and updated lockout procedures.
Integrate shop-floor PLCs with MES for downtime tracking and OEE reporting across three production lines.
Replace pneumatic controls in compressor room with PLC-based sequencing and remote monitoring dashboard.
Preventive maintenance and on-call controls support contract covering drives, PLCs, and HMIs.
Fabricate and wire twelve UL508A control enclosures for OEM customer per provided schematics.
Upgrade wastewater treatment pH control loop with new analyzers, dosing pumps, and PLC logic.
Expand AGV routes into warehouse zone B with new navigation markers, traffic management logic, and charging station.
Retrofit heat-treat furnace with new thermocouples, PID controllers, and data logging for quality compliance.
Replace aging PLC-5 controllers with modern ControlLogix hardware on assembly operations, converting I/O and revising operator screens.
Move existing Wonderware supervisory system to current AVEVA platform; includes server redundancy and historian connection.
Procure and integrate FANUC welding robots with guarding and fixtures, tied into the line control system.
Upgrade Line 4 conveyor drives to VFDs with new sensors and zone-based speed control programming.
Connect production line PLCs to manufacturing execution software for OEE and downtime data collection.
